what_happened: Daily summaries plus a few representative daily photos showed usable coverage, repeated overnight uncertainty, and modest signs of steady basil establishment.
what_was_expected: Hourly capture should have produced clean daily evidence and light-state checks should have been easy to classify.
taste_yield_meaning: The grow still looks on a viable path, but unreliable sensing weakens confidence in yield/taste forecasts.
model_change: Use curated daily evidence to correct the trend model, keep prior trend predictions visible, add an amendment reducing confidence in the light/reliability model, and prioritize system repair over new inference.

attribution.nature: Plant changes remain slow but plausible.
attribution.gardener: No gardener-caused deviation is evident from this week alone.
attribution.system: Repeated unclear or missed checks point to system weakness.

next_week_focus: Only tighten growth predictions if the evidence gets cleaner.
